summary: Completed testing of Phase 1 Feature #2: Multi-document upload + OCR extraction. All 19 backend API tests passed. All 10 frontend UI tests passed. Document upload (pasted text, PDF), listing, type changes, and deletion work correctly. Mobile-first layout verified at 390x844 viewport.

issues: Console warning: nested <button> inside <button> - HTML validation issue but doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: POST /api/projects/{id}/documents - upload pasted text with type selection - PASS
POST /api/projects/{id}/documents - test 5 document types (sides, instructions, wardrobe, notes, reference) - PASS
POST /api/projects/{id}/documents - empty text returns 400 - PASS
POST /api/projects/{id}/documents - text < 5 chars returns 400 - PASS
POST /api/projects/{id}/documents - enforces 5 document limit - PASS
GET /api/projects/{id}/documents - list documents (excludes original_text) - PASS
GET /api/projects/{id}/documents - returns 404 for non-existent project - PASS
GET /api/documents/{id} - get single document with full text - PASS
GET /api/documents/{id} - returns 404 for non-existent document - PASS
PUT /api/documents/{id}/type - update document type - PASS
PUT /api/documents/{id}/type - all valid type transitions work - PASS
PUT /api/documents/{id}/type - invalid type returns 400 - PASS
PUT /api/documents/{id}/type - returns 404 for non-existent document - PASS
DELETE /api/documents/{id} - delete document and remove from project - PASS
DELETE /api/documents/{id} - returns 404 for non-existent document - PASS
POST /api/projects/{id}/documents - upload PDF file with text extraction - PASS
GET /api/projects - document_count updates correctly - PASS
Full CRUD flow: Create → List → Get → Update Type → Delete → Verify - PASS
POST /api/projects/{id}/documents - returns 404 for non-existent project - PASS
DocumentUpload screen shows Browse Files, Take Photo, and Paste Text buttons - PASS
Paste Text flow: toggle textarea, type text, select type, submit - document appears in list - PASS
Document cards show filename, char count, extraction method, and type badges - PASS
Type badge tap changes document type (visual update + persisted to backend) - PASS
Delete button removes document from list with toast confirmation - PASS
Continue button shows at bottom when documents exist - PASS
Home screen shows correct document_count per project - PASS
Opening a project with existing documents shows them in the upload screen - PASS
Back button navigation from upload screen to home - PASS
Mobile viewport (390x844) layout - touch targets adequate, no horizontal overflow - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: server.py lines 1039-1201: Document upload endpoint well-implemented with proper validation, file type detection, OCR fallback, and MongoDB persistence
Document types validated against allowed set: sides, instructions, wardrobe, notes, reference, unknown
GET /api/projects/{id}/documents correctly excludes original_text for performance (line 1211)
DELETE /api/documents/{id} properly removes from project's document_ids array and deletes file if exists
DocumentUpload.jsx uses proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Type badges correctly update both UI state and persist to backend via PUT /api/documents/{id}/type
seed_data_creation: Test projects and documents created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Document upload (Phase 1 Feature #2) fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/projects/{id}/documents (upload), GET /api/projects/{id}/documents (list), GET /api/documents/{id} (single), PUT /api/documents/{id}/type (update type), DELETE /api/documents/{id} (delete). Frontend component: DocumentUpload.jsx. Data-testid attributes: document-upload, file-upload-btn, camera-upload-btn, paste-text-btn, paste-textarea, paste-type-select, paste-submit-btn, doc-card-{id}, doc-type-{id}-{type}, delete-doc-{id}, continue-btn, upload-back-btn, no-docs-state. Existing projects: 'Self-Tape Test' (1 doc), 'Upload Test Project' (2 docs), 'Project Toddler' (0 docs).

upload_pasted_text.details: POST /api/projects/{id}/documents with pasted_text field creates document with extraction_method='paste'

upload_pdf_file.details: POST /api/projects/{id}/documents with file field extracts text via PyPDF2 or OCR fallback

document_limit.details: Maximum 5 documents per project enforced, returns 400 with clear message

list_documents.details: GET /api/projects/{id}/documents returns documents without original_text for performance

get_single_document.details: GET /api/documents/{id} returns full document including original_text

update_document_type.details: PUT /api/documents/{id}/type updates type, validates against allowed types

delete_document.details: DELETE /api/documents/{id} removes document, updates project, deletes file

document_upload_ui.details: Browse Files, Take Photo, Paste Text buttons visible and functional

paste_text_flow.details: Toggle textarea, type text, select type, submit - document appears in list

document_cards.details: Cards show filename, char count, extraction method, type badges

type_badge_change.details: Clicking type badge updates UI and persists to backend

delete_button.details: Delete removes document with toast confirmation

continue_button.details: Shows at bottom when documents exist, shows count

existing_documents_load.details: Opening project with documents shows them in upload screen

mobile_layout.details: 390x844 viewport - adequate touch targets, no horizontal overflow
